name: Bergen Limo
recent_news: No M&A or news found. Public-facing Bergen Limo (bergenlimo.com / bergen-limo.com) markets weddings, proms, corporate and party-bus services in Bergen County NJ; established 1994. No indication of school district SPED contracts despite the data tag.
fit_notes: Likely a luxury/livery operator, not a true school-bus contractor. NJ has many tiny 'limousine' LLCs that hold sporadic SPED van runs, but no evidence Bergen Limo holds NJ school contracts. Low fit for Summit tuck-in absent confirmation.

name: Chris Limousine Svc Inc
recent_news: No web presence or news identified. Company is a micro-operator (~4 employees, ~$318K rev est) based at 13 Lincoln Pl, Lodi NJ; not found in NJ DOE 2020-21 contractor PDF excerpt or in standard limousine directories.
fit_notes: Sub-scale (1-3 vehicle) family/owner-operator. Too small to be a meaningful Summit tuck-in on its own; could only be relevant as part of a roll-up of NJ SPED van operators.

name: Concord Limousine
recent_news: No M&A or news found tying the Paramus NJ Concord Limousine to Anthony Piccini specifically. A separately branded 'Concord Limousine' (Brooklyn NY, est. 1984) and 'Concorde Worldwide' (Freehold NJ) appear in search but are distinct entities. The Paramus address (60 Cloverdale Ave) suggests a small home-based limo operator.
fit_notes: Micro livery operator with possible incidental SPED runs. Sub-scale for Summit; not a strategic target.

name: Express Car & Limousine Svc
recent_news: No web presence found for an 'Express Car & Limousine' at 18 Warren St, Bergenfield NJ with principal David Zig. Several unrelated Bergen-area limo brands (Express Transportation NJ, Prestige, Airbrook, NJ Premier) appear in search results but are distinct.
fit_notes: Likely a 1-3 vehicle owner-operator. Not a Summit-scale tuck-in target; only relevant as an NJ SPED van consolidation play.

name: I K S Transportation Inc
recent_news: No web presence, news, or NJ DOE contractor listing found for IKS Transportation Inc, Harrington Park NJ. Company operates from a PO box (PO Box 92, Harrington Park 07640) consistent with a home-based small SPED van operator in Bergen County.
fit_notes: Sub-scale single-operator van contractor. Not material as a standalone Summit tuck-in; potential only inside a multi-target NJ SPED roll-up.
